todos.title: Add a pause button
todos.body: Add a small pause/resume control for the Asteroids game. Keep the current score visible while paused and make sure keyboard input resumes cleanly.

todos.title: Add stronger missiles
todos.body: Make an upgraded missile type that can clear larger shards or pierce through two targets. Keep the change scoped to gameplay tuning and bullet behavior.

todos.title: Create power-ups
todos.body: Add one simple power-up pickup that appears occasionally, has a clear visual style, and gives the player a short-lived gameplay boost.

todos.title: Add a shield pickup
todos.body: Add a shield pickup that lets the player survive one collision. Show a visible shield state around the face while it is active.

todos.title: Add asteroid splitting
todos.body: When a large asteroid is hit, split it into two smaller pieces instead of removing it immediately. Keep collision behavior predictable.

todos.title: Add sound effects
todos.body: Add lightweight sound effects for shooting, collecting an item, and game over. Include a mute control so the preview stays comfortable.

todos.title: Add a combo meter
todos.body: Track quick consecutive asteroid clears and show a small combo multiplier near the score. Reset the combo when the player stops clearing shards.

todos.title: Polish the mobile controls
todos.body: Improve the touch controls so dragging and shooting feel clearer on a phone-sized preview. Keep desktop keyboard controls unchanged.
